'''Romi Moola''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who formerly served [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed after she escaped [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] while attempting to [[Death/Legends|kill]] him by poisoning his [[Chuba stew/Legends|chuba stew]], only to have it kill his loyal chef instead. She was captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], who claimed the bounty.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Romi Moola's bounty is worth 3,000 credits alive and 1,500 credits dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
